title: The Patient in Room 18
writer: Eugene Solow, Robertson White, Mignon G. Eberhart
actors: Patric Knowles, Ann Sheridan, Eric Stanley
plot: Lance is sent to the hospital to recuperate from a nervous breakdown. At the hospital, Sara is his nurse and she still holds a grudge from the last court case. At the hospital, a wealthy patient has just donated $100,000 worth of ...
